hero.info: I build fast and visually appealing web applications using React and TypeScript. I write clean code and design user-friendly interfaces—from landing pages to e-commerce sites.

vantage.description: A fully-featured landing page for a SaaS product. Responsive layout, hamburger menu, sections highlighting features, reviews, and pricing.

furniro.description: An online furniture store with a shopping cart, favorites, and notifications. State management on Zustand.

cafee.description: How much coffee did I drink

about.subtitle: A little bit about myself
about.title: Who am I
about.firstp: Hi! My name is <1>Kirill</1>—I’m a frontend developer specializing in React applications. I code in TypeScript, style my layouts with Tailwind CSS, and manage state using Zustand.
about.secondp: It’s important to me that the code is <w>clean and readable</w>, and that the interface is <w>user-friendly and fast</w>. I approach every project as if I were building it for myself.
about.thirdp: I'm ready to take on landing pages, corporate websites, and front-end development for e-commerce projects

contact.subtitle: Application
contact.title: Tell us about the project
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell me what needs to be done—the type of website, its features, the deadline...
contact.errorMsg: An error occurred while sending the message. Please try again later.

callMe.subtitle: Communication
callMe.title: Got a project? Let's talk
callMe.info: I'm available for freelance projects. Feel free to reach out—I'll get back to you quickly.
